signal_claude_bridge._comment_agent: Optional: name of a Claude Code agent to use (omit to use default claude behavior)
signal_claude_bridge._comment_received_message: Acknowledgment sent to the user when their message is received
signal_claude_bridge._comment_prompt_prefix: Injected before the user's message to frame it as untrusted input. Customize to match your agent's scope.
signal_claude_bridge._comment_bridge_settings_path: Optional: path to a Claude Code settings.json with a permission allowlist for the bridge subprocess. When set, the bridge ignores ~/.claude/settings*.json and uses only this file.
